creator: steve@havk.org
text:
Thanks Sergey for the quick response.  Since 0.9.0 is less than
20000916.01 should we set PORTEPOCH=1 with this change?

-steve

On Tue, Jul 31, 2001 at 01:50:57AM +0400, Sergey A.Osokin wrote:
> 
> >Description:
> 	update mail/pflogsumm to 0.9.0
> >How-To-Repeat:
> 	
> >Fix:
> 
> diff -ruN pflogsumm.old/Makefile pflogsumm/Makefile
> --- pflogsumm.old/Makefile	Tue Jul 31 01:42:48 2001
> +++ pflogsumm/Makefile	Tue Jul 31 01:47:17 2001
> @@ -6,10 +6,9 @@
>  #
>  
>  PORTNAME=	pflogsumm
> -PORTVERSION=	20000916.01
> +PORTVERSION=	0.9.0
>  CATEGORIES=	mail
>  MASTER_SITES=	http://jimsun.LinxNet.com/downloads/
> -DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}
>  EXTRACT_SUFX=	.pl
>  
>  MAINTAINER=	ozz@FreeBSD.org.ru
> diff -ruN pflogsumm.old/distinfo pflogsumm/distinfo
> --- pflogsumm.old/distinfo	Tue Jul 31 01:42:48 2001
> +++ pflogsumm/distinfo	Tue Jul 31 01:44:50 2001
> @@ -1 +1 @@
> -MD5 (pflogsumm.pl) = aeab8bf6d88e4b529b3000c0fd2e5bf1
> +MD5 (pflogsumm-0.9.0.pl) = a663f2a80b0c868dccb92566c4ea9158
